validation_rows.subject: upstream_lock_binding
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-01 binds current P3_BUILD_LOCK and its approved review decision.
validation_rows.negative_case: P3_BUILD_LOCK sha drift or missing review decision must fail

validation_rows.subject: cli_thinness
validation_rows.requirement: drdctl handlers parse, dispatch, report, and do not own product inference.
validation_rows.evidence: future tests inspect CLI command handlers and module delegation
validation_rows.negative_case: CLI handler mutates locks or infers product semantics directly

validation_rows.subject: program_dag_determinism
validation_rows.requirement: program DAG nodes, edges, and execution order are stable for same inputs.
validation_rows.evidence: future driver tests compare replayed DAG snapshots
validation_rows.negative_case: filesystem order or nondeterministic ids change replay output

validation_rows.subject: adapter_source_preservation
validation_rows.requirement: adapters preserve input hashes and normalization reports.
validation_rows.evidence: future adapter tests assert source byte hash and section records
validation_rows.negative_case: adapter changes source bytes or drops unsupported content evidence

validation_rows.subject: adapter_semantic_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: adapters do not emit product requirements, page elements, layout rules, or business contracts.
validation_rows.evidence: future adapter tests reject forbidden output keys
validation_rows.negative_case: adapter creates downstream product capability from markdown formatting

validation_rows.subject: command_status_payload
validation_rows.requirement: each command emits machine-readable status, findings, written paths, and exit code.
validation_rows.evidence: future CLI smoke tests validate JSON status shape
validation_rows.negative_case: command emits text only or omits written paths

validation_rows.subject: gate_stop_rules
validation_rows.requirement: commands stop before Human Gate, lock creation, release lock creation, and unresolved invalidation.
validation_rows.evidence: future integration tests trigger each gate
validation_rows.negative_case: command proceeds through gate without explicit review or lock authorization

validation_rows.subject: scope_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-01 candidate only writes its candidate directory.
validation_rows.negative_case: candidate mutates repository code, locks, or root phase files
